name: Deezer
description: Music streaming service offering access to millions of tracks, podcasts, and radio stations worldwide.

years.notes: Icon-only mark extracted from full wordmark SVG. Five vertical columns of colored rectangular blocks (equalizer motif): red, yellow, pink/magenta, lime green, cyan. Text paths (fill:#231f20) omitted.

Simplified equalizer bars mark with gradient fills. Four columns in staircase arrangement. Gradient transitions: orange to crimson, yellow to orange-red, crimson to navy, teal to green, navy to steel-blue.
Rebrand announced 2023-11-07 at Deezer Drop event, Paris. Designed by Koto agency. Stylized purple heart of overlapping vertical ovals evoking a sound waveform — brand color Deezer Purple #A335FF.
